foreach.open: INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING (REQUEST_NO, USE_YN, OBJECT_ID, OBJECT_NO, OBJECT_NM, BUSINESS_AREA_CD, BUSINESS_TYPE_CD, SW_VERSION_NO, DOC_VERSION_NO, REV_NO, CURRENT_PAGE_NO, TOTAL_PAGE_NO, ECN_NO, STD_GAPP_DT, CHANGE_GAPP_DT, PROTECT_YN, PRODUCT_CD, DISTRIBUTE_TYPE_CD, FILE_NM, APPLY_HOGI_NO, OBJECT_CLASS_NM2, OBJECT_CLASS_CD2) VALUES

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL ( REQUEST_NO , PROCESS_SEQ , APPROVAL_STATUS_CD , ORIGINAL_USER_CD , ACTUAL_USER_CD , REQUEST_DESC , ACTION_DT , ACTION_CD , APPROVAL_GRADE_CD ) SELECT #{requestNo} AS REQUEST_NO , PROCESS_SEQ_NO AS PROCESS_SEQ , APPROVAL_STATUS_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{sessionUser.userCd} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' THEN #{acceptanceUserCd} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'WAITING' THEN #{outApprovalTeamLeaderCd} ELSE '' END AS ORIGINAL_USER_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{deployUserCd} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT' THEN #{acceptanceUserCd} WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'WAITING' THEN #{outApprovalTeamLeaderCd} ELSE '' END AS ACTUAL_USER_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN #{requestDesc} ELSE NULL END AS REQUEST_DESC , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END AS ACTION_DT , 'REQUEST' AS ACTION_CD , CASE WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 1 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 3 THEN 'TL' WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 1 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 4 THEN 'DEF' WHEN APPROVAL_LINE_ID = 2 AND PROCESS_SEQ_NO = 3 THEN 'TL' ELSE '' END AS APPROVAL_GRADE_CD FROM DOCS_APPROVAL_LINE_DETAIL WHERE APPROVAL_LINE_ID = #{approvalLineId}

foreach.open: INSERT INTO DOCS_REQUEST_FILE (REQUEST_NO, OBJECT_ID, FILE_PATH_NM, ORG_FILE_NM, FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, CHECK_SUM, FILE_NO, USE_START_YMD, USE_END_YMD) VALUES

mapper.select: SELECT request.REQUEST_NO , request.BUSINESS_AREA_CD , requestDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD AS purchaserUid , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = requestDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD) AS purchaserNm , request.REQUEST_PURPOSE , deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD , (SELECT USER_NM FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD) AS deployUserNm , deploy.DEPLOY_USER_EMAIL , requestDetail.REQUEST_DESC , request.OBJECT_TYPE FROM DOCS_REQUEST request LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL requestDetail ON request.REQUEST_NO = requestDetail.REQUEST_NO AND requestDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'REQUEST' LEFT JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY deploy ON request.REQUEST_NO = deploy.REQUEST_NO WHERE request.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT fileInfo.OBJECT_ID AS objectId , fileInfo.FILE_PATH_NM AS filePathNm , fileInfo.ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm , fileInfo.FILE_NM AS fileNm , fileInfo.FILE_SIZE AS fileSize
, 1 AS fileNo
, fileInfo.FILE_NO AS fileNo
FROM DOCS_DRAWING fileInfo
FROM DOCS_DOCUMENT_FILE fileInfo
FROM DOCS_SW_FILE fileInfo
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_DOCUMENT_FILE fileInfo
FROM DOCS_PRODUCT_SW_FILE fileInfo
WHERE 1=1 AND OBJECT_ID IN (
#{mappingParam.objectId}
)
AND FILE_NO IN (
#{mappingParam.fileNo}
)
